From: "Jim Liao" <jliao@mas.org>
Subject: RE: Update
Date: Wed, 02 Jan 2008 19:42:56 GMT
To: DKIESQ@aol.com

Hi, I expect to have something from our lawyers before the end of the
week. Both redline and final drafts for your review.

 

Best, jim

 

________________________________

From: DKIESQ@aol.com [mailto:DKIESQ@aol.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, January 02, 2008 1:10 PM
To: Jim Liao
Subject: Update

 

Any idea when I can expect to receive the revised draft of the lease
extension?  Please advise.

 

Darren K. Indyke
